rulings.Case Title: LONNETTE ROBINSON ET AL VS. LARUE PERKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order: (1) Approving Receivers Final Account And Report; (2) Confirming Receivers Actions And Discharging The Receiver; (3) Approving Distribution Of Funds Held In Reserve; (4) Approving Payment Of Professional Fees And Costs; And (5) Approving Disbursement Of Any Funds Remaining; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 1. OTHER SUSAN UECKER (RECEIVER) Notice Of Motion For Order: (1) Approving Receivers Final Account And Report; (2) Confirming Receivers Actions And Discharging The Receiver; (3) Approving Distribution Of Funds Held In Reserve; (4) Approving Payment Of Professional Fees And Costs; And (5) Approving Disbursement Of Any Funds Remaining; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof is GRANTED as requested, except the $6,000 held for the benefit of deceased William Bowser shall be posted with the Court until the dispute over this amount is resolved. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JINLIN ZHANG ET AL VS. LEONARD HO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF JINLIN ZHANG, MIAOQIONG QUAN, ANDREW ZHANG, MIAOQIONG QIAN Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGIL DENISE BRADLEY-TYSON VS. DWIGHT W. DAVENPORT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT ELK HALL INVESTORS, INC. DBA KELLER WILLIAMS, YOLANDA JAMES-ELSTON DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith that the decedent did not instruct the defendant to prepare the Deed in the form executed and instructed her to prepare a Deed in a form different from the one executed, e.g. the decedent did not instruct for BJT to be one of the grantee's or to hold 75% interest or decedent instructions were to "husband and wife as joint tenants with right of survivorship" without specific percentages or BJT as grantee. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGIL DENISE BRADLEY-TYSON VS. DWIGHT W. DAVENPORT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT BJT HOLDINGS, INC., DWIGHT DAVENPORT Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Motion is defective. CRC 3.1322 =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGIL DENISE BRADLEY-TYSON VS. DWIGHT W. DAVENPORT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT DWIGHT DAVENPORT, BJT HOLDINGS, INC. DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to fraud-based causes of action for Plaintiff to allege reliance of Davenport's representations (as opposed to reliance on decedent's representations due to the nature of this marital relationship). Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend for causes of action for quiet title, reformation and unjust enrichment as to Davenport individually. Demurrer is overruled at to these causes of action as to BJT Holdings, Inc to the extent Plaintiff is able to allege fraud or these causes of action are based solely on mistake (if legally proper). =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD A. PETERSON VS. JEAN I. MENES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT JEAN MENES DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to Donald Peterson, an individual. Plaintiff failed to allege any facts to support individual ownership claim as opposed to the claim in his capacity as at trustee of the co-owner Trust. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD A. PETERSON VS. JEAN I. MENES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jean I. Menes? Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; And Declaration Of Kevin C. Menes
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT JEAN MENES Defendant Jean I. Menes? Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; And Declaration Of Kevin C. Menes is GRANTED. Motion is based on two distinct grounds. Plaintiff's opposition does not address failure to comply with CCP 405.20. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD A. PETERSON VS. JEAN I. MENES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jean I. Menes? Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT JEAN MENES Defendant Jean I. Menes? Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of The Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof is granted in part and denied in part. Motion is granted as to the prayer for compensatory damages with leave to amend to allege in good faith facts supporting the claim for such recovery. Motion is otherwise denied. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALL HALLOWS ASSOCIATES,L.P. VS. JANET WILLIAMS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: In Support Of Mtn To Enter Joint Stipulation To Restrict Record Per Ccp 1161.2 Notwithstanding The Case'S Dismissal With Prejudice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT JANET WILLIAMS Ntc Of Mtn In Support Of Mtn To Enter Joint Stipulation To Restrict Record Per Ccp 1161.2 Notwithstanding The Case'S Dismissal With Prejudice is GRANTED. Access to the records shall be restricted per CCP 1161.2. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRI COUNTIES BANK VS. CATHERINE CHOW ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 16, 2020 line 6. PLAINTIFF TRI COUNTIES BANK MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH)
